── COLLECTIONS ──
AlphaCentauriKid
Collections Connect Wallet
Alpha Centauri Kid

slave to the Muse

Making Of
Vibe coded from the ground up. No templates, no frameworks, no design files — just creative direction, iteration, and an uncompromising eye.
34,000+ lines single index.html 0 frameworks
The Vision
The interface draws from Cinema 4D's node editor — a tool A.C.K. knows intimately from years of 3D work. Each collection is a node. Each artwork is a connection. The wires between them are alive, drawn in real-time, responding to the layout like a living circuit.
On-Chain Provenance
Every full-resolution artwork URL is pulled directly from Ethereum contract metadata — Arweave permanent storage for Broken Keys, ACKPFP, ACK Editions, Clown Party, and Warothys. IPFS gateway URLs for SuperRare and Opepen. The gallery serves art from the same immutable addresses stored on-chain.
The Architecture
One file. 34,000+ lines of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. No React. No build step. No dependencies. The entire gallery — node graph, focus views, thematic SVG frames, wallet connection, edition pickers, mobile swipe, lore sequences, and generative audio — lives in a single index.html deployed to Vercel.
Collector Integration
Connect a wallet and the gallery reads on-chain holdings via Alchemy's NFT API. Collected works surface in a personal view with floor prices, edition counts, and direct links to OpenSea and Etherscan. The same contracts used for provenance power the collector experience.
The Process
Built through conversation between A.C.K. and Claude. The artist directed every visual decision — layouts, color, frame design, sound, interaction. The AI wrote the code. Hundreds of iterations. Dozens of rejected approaches. The gallery is the artifact of that exchange.
Directed by A.C.K. · Built with Claude · gallery.ack.art
